categories.name: Shell
categories.purpose: Application frame and persistent global regions.

categories.name: Navigation
categories.purpose: Movement between app sections and workflow locations.

categories.name: Surface
categories.purpose: Containers, cards, panels, and visual grouping surfaces.

categories.name: Forms
categories.purpose: Inputs, labels, validation, and controlled data entry.

categories.name: Tables
categories.purpose: Tabular data, grids, rows, columns, pagination, and row actions.

categories.name: Filters
categories.purpose: Search, chip, and filtering controls for dense views.

categories.name: Feedback
categories.purpose: Alerts, toasts, validation summaries, and user-facing messages.

categories.name: Status
categories.purpose: Compact state indicators for jobs, results, and workflow state.

categories.name: Overlays
categories.purpose: Dialogs, drawers, popovers, menus, and tooltips.

categories.name: Workflow
categories.purpose: Multi-step, event, and execution workflow patterns.

categories.name: Engineering Artifacts
categories.purpose: Artifacts, evidence, requirements, traces, and test summaries.

categories.name: Code and Logs
categories.purpose: Code, logs, diffs, paths, and technical text.

categories.name: Content
categories.purpose: Text blocks, empty states, help content, and key-value summaries.

components.name: App Shell
components.description: a persistent application frame for dark-first engineering workflows.

components.name: Top Bar
components.description: a persistent top region for product context, global actions, and status.

components.name: Primary Navigation
components.description: top-level movement between major application areas.

components.name: Secondary Navigation
components.description: movement within a page, workspace, or secondary workflow context.

components.name: Breadcrumbs
components.description: hierarchical location context for nested artifacts or records.

components.name: Page Header
components.description: a consistent title, subtitle, metadata, and page action region.

components.name: Command Action Bar
components.description: a grouped action region for page-level commands and workflow actions.

components.name: Panel
components.description: a default bounded container for related engineering UI content.

components.name: Raised Card
components.description: a higher-emphasis surface for metrics, summaries, or selected records.

components.name: Inset Panel
components.description: a recessed container nested inside a parent panel.

components.name: Section Header
components.description: a labeled divider for major page or panel sections.

components.name: Toolbar
components.description: a compact horizontal region for controls that affect a nearby panel or table.

components.name: Split Panel
components.description: side-by-side regions for comparing lists, details, artifacts, or evidence.

components.name: Resizable Panel
components.description: adjustable regions for dense technical review workflows.

components.name: Dashboard Grid
components.description: a responsive grid for metrics, charts, summaries, and status panels.

components.name: Detail Layout
components.description: a structured detail page composition with summary, metadata, tabs, and related panels.

components.name: Form Field
components.description: a label, description, control, error, and helper-text wrapper.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: single-line text entry.

components.name: Number Input
components.description: numeric entry with validation and formatting expectations.

components.name: Select
components.description: selection from a constrained list of values.

components.name: Combobox
components.description: searchable selection for long or dynamic option lists.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: multi-line free-text entry for notes, comments, and descriptions.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: binary or multi-select boolean selection.

components.name: Radio Group
components.description: exclusive selection from a small set of choices.

components.name: Switch
components.description: immediate binary setting toggle.

components.name: Date Time Input
components.description: date, time, or timestamp entry for engineering records and filters.

components.name: Search Field
components.description: keyword filtering across tables, artifacts, and records.

components.name: Filter Bar
components.description: a compact control region for filtering high-density datasets.

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: a compact representation of an active filter.

components.name: File Dropzone
components.description: drag-and-drop or browse file intake for artifacts and imports.

components.name: Data Table
components.description: structured tabular presentation of records.

components.name: Data Grid
components.description: interactive tabular review with sorting, selection, and dense engineering metadata.

components.name: Column Header
components.description: labeled table columns with sorting and alignment metadata.

components.name: Row Action Menu
components.description: per-row contextual actions without overcrowding the table.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: navigation across large record sets.

components.name: Empty State
components.description: clear guidance when a panel, table, or workflow has no data.

components.name: Loading State
components.description: temporary state while content, jobs, or artifacts load.

components.name: Error State
components.description: recoverable error presentation for failed loads, validation, or workflows.

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: compact summary of a key count, status, or metric.

components.name: Key Value List
components.description: compact display of metadata pairs.

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: compact visual state indication.

components.name: Alert
components.description: prominent message for important contextual feedback.

components.name: Toast
components.description: temporary non-blocking system feedback.

components.name: Progress Indicator
components.description: linear, circular, or inline indication of task progress.

components.name: Job Status Indicator
components.description: job execution state for queued, running, completed, or failed work.

components.name: Validation Summary
components.description: summary of validation errors, warnings, and blocker status.

components.name: Step Indicator
components.description: visible progress through a multi-step workflow.

components.name: Timeline Event Log
components.description: chronological activity and execution history.

components.name: Dialog
components.description: blocking overlay for focused decisions or forms.

components.name: Confirmation Dialog
components.description: explicit confirmation before destructive or irreversible actions.

components.name: Drawer
components.description: side overlay for supplemental details without full page navigation.

components.name: Popover
components.description: small contextual overlay anchored to a control.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: brief non-interactive explanation for controls or data points.

components.name: Context Menu
components.description: contextual action menu for rows, artifacts, or panes.

components.name: Chart Panel
components.description: a panel that frames a chart with title, legend, controls, and status.

components.name: Line Chart
components.description: time-series or ordered numeric trend visualization.

components.name: Bar Chart
components.description: categorical comparison visualization.

components.name: Legend
components.description: mapping between chart encodings and series meaning.

components.name: Chart Tooltip
components.description: precise data values on hover or focus.

components.name: Threshold Band
components.description: visual warning, tolerance, or pass/fail region in charts.

components.name: Artifact Tree
components.description: hierarchical browsing of project, package, file, or evidence artifacts.

components.name: Traceability Matrix
components.description: matrix view connecting requirements, tests, evidence, and outcomes.

components.name: Diff Viewer
components.description: side-by-side or inline comparison of technical text, generated output, or configuration.

components.name: Log Viewer
components.description: scrollable technical log output with severity, timestamp, and filtering support.

components.name: Code Block
components.description: monospaced display of commands, IDs, paths, snippets, and structured text.

components.name: Evidence Card
components.description: summary card for generated evidence, attachments, validation outcome, and review state.

components.name: Requirement Link
components.description: linked reference to a requirement, design item, test, or evidence artifact.

components.name: Run Test Result Summary
components.description: compact pass, fail, warning, not-run, and coverage summary for execution results.
